Daniel Semerjyan

Enterprise AI & Cloud Adoption // Ex-Founder // Builds in Production

Trusted advisor to enterprises on AI adoption and cloud, and an ex-founder who still ships. I help organizations adopt an AI strategy and benefit from AI transformation, moving from pilots to production: agentic systems, RAG, and GenAI apps in real users' hands on AWS and Azure. At PwC I lead delivery, run technical discovery, and grow accounts with directors and managers. I build with AI every day (Claude Code, Cursor) and pressure-test the business case, not just the code.

github.com/danielsemerjya linkedin.com/in/daniel-semerjyan semerjyan.dev d.semerjyan@gmail.com +48 799 302 749

//professional_experience

AI & Cloud Senior Consultant @ PwC Poland

2022 — current
  • Lead the engineering team and run value-discovery workshops with enterprise stakeholders, mapping business problems to AI and cloud use cases.
  • Shape the proposals and account growth that follow, finding and upselling new work with directors and managers.
  • Authored an agentic AI SDLC framework adopted into an insurance client's AI strategy; roll out and teach Claude Code to developers in a regulated environment.
  • Build and ship production GenAI apps, e.g. a marketing-compliance app for a Big Pharma client, processing 10–60 page PDFs against a golden knowledge base, live to hundreds of internal users.
  • Built a GenAI developer platform on Google Cloud Vertex AI for a bank; led cloud architecture and automation across banking clients.
